produce the definite integral of p(x) from x = 0 to x = 10, representing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna. produce the integral of 4x³ + 3x² + 2x + 7 from 0 to 10, calculating the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna. produce the result of the integration, showing the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna.
